2604.09089.title: DeepGuard: Secure Code Generation via Multi-Layer Semantic Aggregation
2604.09089.paper_summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) for code generation can replicate insecure patterns from their training data. To mitigate this, a common strategy for security hardening is to fine-tune models using supervision derived from the final transformer layer. However, this design may suffer from a final-layer bottleneck: vulnerability-discriminative cues can be distributed across layers and become less detectable near the output representations optimized for next-token prediction. To diagnose this issue, we perform layer-wise linear probing. We observe that vulnerability-related signals are most detectable in a band of intermediate-to-upper layers yet attenuate toward the final layers. Motivated by this observation, we introduce DeepGuard, a framework that leverages distributed security-relevant cues by aggregating representations from multiple upper layers via an attention-based module. The aggregated signal powers a dedicated security analyzer within a multi-objective training objective that balances security enhancement and functional correctness, and further supports a lightweight inference-time steering strategy. Extensive experiments across five code LLMs demonstrate that DeepGuard improves the secure-and-correct generation rate by an average of 11.9% over strong baselines such as SVEN. It also preserves functional correctness while exhibiting generalization to held-out vulnerability types. Our code is public at https://github.com/unknownhl/DeepGuard.
2604.09089.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）用於代碼生成時，可能會複製其訓練數據中的不安全模式。為了減輕這一問題，安全加固的一個常見策略是使用來自最終Transformer層的監督來微調模型。然而，這一設計可能會遭遇最終層瓶頸：與漏洞識別相關的線索可能分佈在多個層中，並在針對下一個標記預測優化的輸出表示附近變得不易檢測。為了診斷這一問題，我們進行了逐層線性探測。我們觀察到，與漏洞相關的信號在中層到上層的一個帶狀區域中最為可檢測，但在最終層中減弱。受到這一觀察的啟發，我們引入了DeepGuard，一個通過基於注意力的模塊聚合多個上層表示來利用分佈式安全相關線索的框架。聚合的信號為一個專門的安全分析器提供動力，該分析器在多目標訓練目標中平衡安全增強和功能正確性，並進一步支持輕量級推理時的引導策略。對五個代碼LLM的廣泛實驗表明，DeepGuard在強基準（如SVEN）上平均提高了11.9%的安全和正確生成率。它還保持了功能正確性，同時對保留的漏洞類型展現了泛化能力。我們的代碼公開於 https://github.com/unknownhl/DeepGuard。
2604.09089.author: Li Huang et.al.
2604.09089.authors: Li Huang, Zhongxin Liu, Yifan Wu, Tao Yin, Dong Li, Jichao Bi, Nankun Mu, Hongyu Zhang, Meng Yan
